text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did I just hear a camera go off?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you! In the shadows by the pillar.<n>Yes, you!
Why don't you come closer?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You want to stay there? Are you sure?<n>We could
take a super cute selfie<n>together...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll just give you some super cute<n>poses
instead! ♪ Doo-de-doo! ☆
